title: Savory German Dumpling Soup
description: A hearty and comforting German soup made with rich and savory flavors, filled with fluffy dumplings and tender polish sausage. This dish is sure to become a favorite on a chilly day.

ingredients.name: cheese
ingredients.notes: grated, preferably cheddar or a german cheese

instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sliced sausage to the pot and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the chopped onion, carrots, and potatoes to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
4. Add 4 cups of beef broth to the pot and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer the soup for 20 minutes.
6. While the soup is cooking, prepare the dumplings.
7. In a large bowl, combine 2 cups of all-purpose flour, 2 teaspoons of baking powder, and 1/4 cup of grated cheese.
8. Add 1/2 cup of milk and 1 large egg to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
9. Drop the dough by spoonfuls onto the surface of the simmering soup.
10. Cover the pot and cook the dumplings for 10-15 minutes, or until they are cooked through.
11. Season the soup with salt and pepper to taste.
12. Serve the soup hot, garnished with additional grated cheese if desired.
